top_10_recommendations.recommendation: Use faker with fixed seed (faker.seed(12345)) for all unique test data
Split large integration test files (>400 lines) into smaller, focused files
Replace waitForTimeout(1500) with conditional waits (expect().toBeVisible() or waitForResponse)
Extract duplicate login code into helper functions or use Page Object Model pattern
Create shared test utilities for common operations (login, user creation, password change)
Use vi.stubEnv() instead of direct process.env mutation for auto-cleanup
Remove or conditionally enable debug console.log statements in tests
Replace waitForTimeout(1500) with conditional waits (expect().toBeVisible() or waitForResponse)
Consider using transaction rollback instead of DELETE for integration test cleanup
Consider creating test-specific data instead of relying on shared seed data for true isolation
